positive: A detailed minimalist forest scene featuring abstract silhouettes of stylized trees and wandering forest animals (deer, foxes, rabbits) in motion. The style should be modern woodcut engraving meets abstract watercolor wash, utilizing deep indigo, moss green, and burnt orange against a creamy off-white background. Focus on strong, graphic contrast and clean, uninterrupted lines suitable for screen printing. The composition must be centralized and symmetrical, with negative space defining the edges. Include repeating, subtle geometric patterns inspired by nature (leaf veins, spiral growth).
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, blurry, distorted, bad anatomy, low contrast, noisy, grain, extra limbs, cartoon, realistic photo, photographic, muted colors
